title: BEM-882 readiness audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/backlog').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
artifacts = [
 'governance/state/architecture_registry.json',
 'governance/state/objects_registry.json',
 'governance/state/task_registry.json',
 'governance/state/rule_registry.json',
 'governance/state/channel_registry.json',
 'governance/state/workspace_registry.json',
 'governance/state/product_repository_registry.json',
 'governance/state/testing_policy.json',
 'governance/logs/event_log.jsonl'
]
status = {}
for p in artifacts:
    path = Path(p)
    status[p] = {'exists': path.exists(), 'size': path.stat().st_size if path.exists() else 0}
missing = [p for p, s in status.items() if not s['exists']]
scaffold = []
if Path('governance/state/product_repository_registry.json').exists():
    data = json.loads(Path('governance/state/product_repository_registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    if data.get('repositories') == []:
        scaffold.append('product_repository_registry has no registered product repos yet')
if Path('governance/state/rule_registry.json').exists():
    data = json.loads(Path('governance/state/rule_registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    if len(data.get('rules', [])) < 5:
        scaffold.append('rule_registry is baseline only and needs operational rule expansion')
if Path('governance/state/channel_registry.json').exists():
    scaffold.append('managed channel is specified but no message queue/transport implementation is active yet')
if Path('governance/state/workspace_registry.json').exists():
    scaffold.append('workspaces exist as directories but need automated promotion/test checks')
backlog_items = [
 {'id':'BEM-882-001','title':'Add registry schema validation','owner':'WRK-C1','why':'ensure json registries are machine-checkable'},
 {'id':'BEM-882-002','title':'Add rule registry operational seed rules','owner':'WRK-C2','why':'baseline rules are insufficient for real execution'},
 {'id':'BEM-882-003','title':'Implement channel message envelope and append-only message log','owner':'WRK-C2','why':'managed channel must become executable, not only described'},
 {'id':'BEM-882-004','title':'Add workspace promotion checks from development to testing to main','owner':'WRK-C3','why':'PASS promotion must be enforceable'},
 {'id':'BEM-882-005','title':'Add product repository registration template','owner':'WRK-C3','why':'product repo loop needs repeatable onboarding'},
 {'id':'BEM-882-006','title':'Add integration selftest for BEM-880 baseline','owner':'WRK-C3','why':'next changes need automatic proof'}
]
Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json').write_text(json.dumps({'status':'ready','items':backlog_items}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
report = '# BEM-882 Readiness audit\n\nStatus: COMPLETED\n\nChecked artifacts: ' + str(len(artifacts)) + '\n\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n\nProtocol-level scaffold still present:\n'
for item in scaffold:
    report += '- ' + item + '\n'
report += '\nNext executable backlog:\n'
for item in backlog_items:
    report += '- ' + item['id'] + ' | ' + item['title'] + ' | owner: ' + item['owner'] + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM882_READINESS_AUDIT.md').write_text(report, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM882_READINESS_AUDIT_COMPLETED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-882 readiness audit proof\nStatus: COMPLETED\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\nBacklog: governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json','governance/reports/BEM882_READINESS_AUDIT.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM882 readiness audit completed and backlog created')
"""
No issue comments.
